'''nodachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equiangular|equiangular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equiangular|equiangular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nodachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodachithi|nodachithi]] || [[word:nodachiji|nodachiji]] || [[word:nodachishi|nodachishi]] || [[word:nodachiki|nodachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodachuthuthu|nodachuthuthu]] || [[word:nodachujuju|nodachujuju]] || [[word:nodachushushu|nodachushushu]] || [[word:nodachukuku|nodachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodachuthu|nodachuthu]] || [[word:nodachuju|nodachuju]] || [[word:nodachushu|nodachushu]] || [[word:nodachuku|nodachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodachufthuf|nodachufthuf]] || [[word:nodachufjuf|nodachufjuf]] || [[word:nodachufshuf|nodachufshuf]] || [[word:nodachufkuf|nodachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodachethe|nodachethe]] || [[word:nodacheje|nodacheje]] || [[word:nodacheshe|nodacheshe]] || [[word:nodacheke|nodacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodachothotho|nodachothotho]] || [[word:nodachojojo|nodachojojo]] || [[word:nodachoshosho|nodachoshosho]] || [[word:nodachokoko|nodachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodachotho|nodachotho]] || [[word:nodachojo|nodachojo]] || [[word:nodachosho|nodachosho]] || [[word:nodachoko|nodachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodachofthof|nodachofthof]] || [[word:nodachofjof|nodachofjof]] || [[word:nodachofshof|nodachofshof]] || [[word:nodachofkof|nodachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfthĂŻf|nodachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfjĂŻf|nodachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfshĂŻf|nodachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfkĂŻf|nodachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nodachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nodachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nodachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nodachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfthĂŻf|nodachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfjĂŻf|nodachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfshĂŻf|nodachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfkĂŻf|nodachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfthĂŻf|nodachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfjĂŻf|nodachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfshĂŻf|nodachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodachĂŻfkĂŻf|nodachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodachĂŠthĂŠ|nodachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nodachĂŠjĂŠ|nodachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nodachĂŠshĂŠ|nodachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nodachĂŠkĂŠ|nodachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodachathatha|nodachathatha]] || [[word:nodachajaja|nodachajaja]] || [[word:nodachashasha|nodachashasha]] || [[word:nodachakaka|nodachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodachatha|nodachatha]] || [[word:nodachaja|nodachaja]] || [[word:nodachasha|nodachasha]] || [[word:nodachaka|nodachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodachafthaf|nodachafthaf]] || [[word:nodachafjaf|nodachafjaf]] || [[word:nodachafshaf|nodachafshaf]] || [[word:nodachafkaf|nodachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nodachasha|nodachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodachshĂ«asha|nodachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodachroasha|nodachroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodachmuasha|nodachmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodachyaasha|nodachyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodachnkshĂ«asha|gonodachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodachnkroasha|gonodachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodachnkmuasha|gonodachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodachnkyaasha|gonodachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nodadachasha|nodadachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodadachshĂ«asha|nodadachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodadachroasha|nodadachroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodadachmuasha|nodadachmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodadachyaasha|nodadachyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodadachnkshĂ«asha|gonodadachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodadachnkroasha|gonodadachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodadachnkmuasha|gonodadachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodadachnkyaasha|gonodadachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nedĂŠchasha|nedĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nedĂŠchshĂ«asha|nedĂŠchshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nedĂŠchroasha|nedĂŠchroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nedĂŠchmuasha|nedĂŠchmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nedĂŠchyaasha|nedĂŠchyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonedĂŠchnkshĂ«asha|gonedĂŠchnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonedĂŠchnkroasha|gonedĂŠchnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonedĂŠchnkmuasha|gonedĂŠchnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonedĂŠchnkyaasha|gonedĂŠchnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nodfachasha|nodfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodfachshĂ«asha|nodfachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodfachroasha|nodfachroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodfachmuasha|nodfachmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodfachyaasha|nodfachyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodfachnkshĂ«asha|gonodfachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodfachnkroasha|gonodfachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodfachnkmuasha|gonodfachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodfachnkyaasha|gonodfachnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
